name: Air Elemental
description: A massive form of congealed air and vapor with a large head, torso, and powerful arms that move with high speed and accuracy. It projects long-ranged cones of freezing air through magical currents channeled via its arms.

name: Air Elemental Minion
description: A smaller air and vapor construct with a head, torso, and large arms that relies on closing distance to engage prey in melee combat.

name: Alpha Wolf
description: A larger and more durable gray wolf than its pack mates, distinguished by a deep luminous blue aura.

name: Ancient Corpse
description: An undead creature.

name: Ancient Scorpion
description: A wood and steel automaton resembling a scorpion, equipped with a fire cannon and a burst-fire chaingun mounted on its body.

name: Angler
description: A brightly-colored aquatic creature with a single large eye and multiple relatives found across the continent.

name: Arakun Spider
description: An arachnid creature.

name: Automaton Blade
description: A bulky humanoid automaton with twin blades that attacks with a very slow sequence.

name: Automaton Mech
description: A humanoid automaton equipped with a burst-fire gatling gun mounted on its chassis.

name: Bandit
description: A human-like warrior armed with melee weapons who engages enemies in close combat with straightforward attacks.

name: Bandit Archer
description: A human-like archer that attacks from range using projectile weapons rather than engaging in melee.

name: Bandit Boss
description: A heavily armored bandit leader with a distinctive skull-adorned red-and-black outfit, mohawk, and axe who possesses significantly greater durability and combat prowess than standard bandits.

name: Barkrunner
description: A towering tree-like humanoid with dense bark skin and glowing red eyes that bashes foes with powerful limb strikes and blends seamlessly with forest environments.

name: Battle Wraith
description: A floating skeletal undead composed of a skull, ribs, spine, and arms that attacks with aggressive fist-fighting, sometimes removing and flailing its own helmet in combat.

name: Bear
description: A natural beast encountered in isolated locations that attacks with physical strikes.

name: Big Chicken
description: A large avian creature that engages in combat using basic attacks.

name: Bile Lunger
description: A miniboss-tier creature resembling a water-based humanoid that fights using hand-to-hand melee combat.

name: Black Drake
description: A draconic creature with mottled black scales that attacks enemies with powerful claws and white-hot flame breath.

name: Black Skrub
description: A hostile creature with unknown physical characteristics and combat behavior.

name: Black Skrubb
description: A low-level enemy with an unspecified appearance that serves as an early-game encounter.

name: Black Wolf
description: A large predator with a mottled-black coat that hunts in packs, displaying bold and aggressive behavior toward humans.

name: Blaster
description: A heavily armored treaded robotic tank equipped with a grenade launcher for ranged combat.

name: Blazing Elemental
description: A small, knee-high fire elemental that charges at enemies and detonates with intense force and heat.

name: Blue Drake
description: A forest-dwelling drake that breathes a blue weapon as its primary attack.

name: Blue Shard
description: A medium-sized crystalline creature that launches blue homing projectiles at enemies.

name: Bog Beast
description: A swamp-dwelling creature with an unspecified appearance encountered in wetland environments.

name: Bonepicker's Trading Post
description: This is a location, not a monster, and should not be included in this list.

name: Bones
description: An early skeleton revenant with enhanced agility that attacks with flailing bare fists.

name: Bookas
description: A small pygmy spellcaster that uses magic in combat.

name: Braak
description: Blue-skinned, horned humanoids with red eyes, sharp teeth, and white-furred forearms and legs that wear pelts. They are semi-intelligent melee combatants that often coordinate attacks with magic-using variants.

name: Braak Mage
description: A smaller variant of Braak that eschews melee combat in favor of magical attacks against its enemies.

name: Brankar the Scavenger
description: A larger, blue-greenish krug with minimal armor and weaponry who leads groups of scavengers but lacks the combat strength of standard krug warriors.

name: Bronze Gargoyle
description: A ranged magic user that projects long-range laser beams from its eyes with considerable power and accuracy.

name: Cave Angler
description: A creature inhabiting flooded underwater caverns that typically appears in large swarms.

name: Cave Bear
description: A large ursine predator found in cave environments.

name: Cave Giant
description: A towering humanoid creature of exceptional size and strength.

name: Chitterskrag
description: A multi-meter tall arthropod resembling a hybrid of hermit crab and cockroach with a chitinous carapace that typically hunts in large groups to overwhelm prey.

name: Chomper
description: A squat, sentient melee creature distinguished by prominent front incisors found in coastal and cave environments.

name: Cicatrix
description: A skeletal centaur lord clad in heavy armor who wields a flaming sickle and summons waves of skeleton warriors and archers in combat.

name: Clockwork Automaton
description: A large, ornately decorated mechanical construct similar to smaller automaton models. It engages opponents through melee combat with its built-in weaponry.

name: Cobble Man
description: A rocky humanoid creature capable of both melee and ranged attacks. It launches conical sprays of rock projectiles at targets from a distance.

name: Copter
description: A small flying robot with propellers and internal mechanisms, armed with a lightning gun. It hovers above melee range to attack while remaining mobile, posing minimal threat when encountered alone.

name: Crystal Golem
description: A humanoid construct composed of crystalline material. It attacks with powerful hand-to-hand strikes.

name: Crystal Guardian
description: An oversized, shard-like crystalline construct that resembles floating crystal formations. It attacks with claws and ranged crystalline projectiles similar to smaller shards.

name: Cyclops
description: A massive pale-skinned giant with a single large eye and muscular build wearing minimal clothing. It fights with its bare fists or wields enormous clubs as melee weapons.

name: Dark Acolyte
description: A wraith-like skeletal undead with an upper body and no lower half, wearing a horned helmet. It attacks with sharp claws when provoked.

name: Dark Caster
description: A dark-skinned humanoid mage dwelling in cave systems. It casts instantaneous-hit electrical spells at targets.

name: Dark Generator
description: A mago-technological device with a dark, shadowy appearance that channels power through magical-mechanical means. It darkens the surrounding area through its operation.

name: Dark Klaw
description: A bleached-horned variant of the Klaw with distinctive markings across its hide. It engages enemies with melee attacks using its sharp claws and natural weapons.

name: Dark Lunger
description: A dark-colored creature that attacks by rushing toward enemies and clawing with its hands.

name: Dark Mucosa
description: A large red melee-fighting creature that is more robust and aggressive than its lighter-colored relatives.

name: Dark Slinger
description: A ranged attacker that rapidly fires forked javelin-like projectiles at enemies from a distance.

name: Dark Wolf
description: An undead spectral wolf with exposed bone, loose hide, and glowing red eyes that hunts with a pack of regular wolves.

name: Dark Wraith Mage
description: A powerful wraith surrounded by a rust-colored aura that casts homing projectile spells at opponents.

name: Dark Zepheryl
description: A being composed of purple magical energy that attacks by unleashing electrical discharges at enemies.

name: Darkling
description: A creature of unspecified appearance and combat behavior.

name: Death Knight
description: An armored undead warrior wielding a hack and shield that moves with military discipline.

name: Desert Braak
description: Wooly, ram-like humanoids that walk upright and appear social. They hurl boulders at enemies and possess exceptional durability despite not being conventional spellcasters.

name: Doppelganger
description: A shapeshifter that upon detecting an enemy immediately transforms into an exact copy of that target, wielding identical weapons and fighting style.

name: Doppelganger Knave
description: A tougher variant of the standard Doppelganger with the same shapeshifting ability to copy enemies and their equipment.

name: Doppelganger Lord
description: The most powerful Doppelganger variant, distinguished by a green aura, possessing enhanced durability while retaining the ability to assume the form of encountered enemies.

name: Drake
description: A draconic creature class found across various environments, with multiple subspecies adapted to different regions and terrains.

name: Droc
description: A primitive crocodilian humanoid race with upright posture and basic intelligence.

name: Droc Spatter
description: A reddish variant of Droc capable of spitting yellow orbs from its maw, using ranged attacks to maintain distance from opponents.

name: Droc Superior
description: A larger and more powerful Droc with darker green scales and distinctive head markings, wielding a large skull as a melee weapon.

name: Droog Archer
description: A ranged-combat Droog that attacks from distance using projectiles.

name: Droog Captain
description: A heavily tattooed and battle-hardened Droog leader with shaved head, representing a more formidable combat variant than standard warriors.

name: Droog Grunt
description: A hostile Droog warrior with a bulky, aggressive build that engages enemies in close combat using melee weapons.

name: Droog Mage
description: A Droog spellcaster that attacks from a distance using nature-based magic.

name: Dungeon Crawler
description: A decomposed humanoid corpse with only its upper body intact that crawls along the ground, relying on powerful melee attacks and grabbing to damage enemies despite its slow movement.

name: Dust Spider
description: A spider species related to the larger Arakun spiders.

name: Earth Elemental
description: A massive bipedal creature composed of rock and ore deposits that moves slowly but delivers devastating melee damage through its heavy fists and magically-shifting stone body.

name: Earth Elemental Minion
description: A smaller but still enormous stone construct that swings its fists with extreme force in combat.

name: Emerald Spider
description: An oversized green spider that actively hunts prey.

name: Enraged Gorack
description: A more powerful variant of the Gorack with granite-colored skin and colorful attire that strikes harder and endures longer in combat than standard Goracks.

name: Farm Skrub
description: No description provided.

name: Farm Skrubb
description: A weak creature that burrows underground and surfaces to attack prey, launching dark greenish goo at opponents.

name: Ferocious Braak
description: A braak variant with distinctive markings and an unusually aggressive facial appearance.

name: Fire Elemental
description: A tall, gangly biped composed entirely of living fire that attacks aggressively when encountered.

name: Fire Elemental Minion
description: A miniature version of the Fire Elemental, composed of living fire and capable of attacking.

name: Flechette
description: A weaker variant of the Perforator creature.

name: Fleshrender
description: A humanoid creature with a grey body, blue eyes, spiked crown, prominent fangs, and webbed hands and feet adapted for aquatic environments.

name: Flying Gritch
description: A hostile flying arthropod with a grayish appearance resembling a Soul Stinger.

name: Forest Darkling
description: An enhanced variant of the Darkling that casts green sparks and dwells in deep forests.

name: Forest Klaw
description: A predatory forest beast with three angular head horns, large jaws, long wiry arms with huge claws, and slower movement speed that allows for evasion in combat.

name: Forest Phrak
description: A small Phrak subspecies with a relatively low health pool. It attacks with basic melee strikes.

name: Forest Troll
description: A large, black-furred biped with yellow eyes, small ears, and unusually long forearms, wielding a spiked club. Forest Trolls hunt in small packs and will disengage from combat to retreat and regenerate health before returning to attack.

name: Frost Archer
description: A blue-hued archer with enhanced health and damage compared to regular archers, often surrounded by a faint blue aura. It attacks with ranged projectiles.

name: Frost Drake
description: The weakest variant of drake, distinguished by its icy coloration. It attacks with both spell-based frost attacks and physical melee strikes.

name: Frost Golem
description: A magical construct encountered in cold regions with a relatively low threat level. It attacks with upward swinging motions.

name: Frost Mage
description: An ice-adapted humanoid mage with poor individual health and spell damage. It compensates by summoning Ice Warriors repeatedly during combat.

name: Frost Spitter
description: A pale spider camouflaged within ice caverns, physically resembling a Frostnid. It attacks by projecting a frost ray from range.

name: Frost Warrior
description: An opaque humanoid warrior surrounded by a glowing blue aura, with notably high armor and life ratings. It attacks with melee strikes comparable to regular Ice Warriors.

name: Frostnid
description: A slow-moving spider adapted to cold climates. It attacks with simple biting strikes.

name: Frostnid Spitter
description: An oversized spider with pale coloration suited to frozen environments. It attacks from range using projectile frost attacks and is weaker than standard Frost Spitters.

name: Furok
description: A shaggy, white-furred humanoid with massive hands designed for tearing prey apart. It uses its thick fur to blend in with snowy environments while hunting.

name: Furok Slasher
description: A variant of Furok distinguished by dark black stripes across its arms, legs, and upper body, significantly more aggressive and powerful than its standard counterpart.

name: Fury
description: A boss-level monster that serves as a major threat in dungeons.

name: Fury Spawn
description: A small, single-eyed creature with multiple limbs that emit powerful colored energy beams (orange, purple, or green) in a wide frontal attack pattern.

name: Futak the Trainer
description: A Krug leader wielding a hack weapon and shield who fights primarily through commanding and coordinating numerous allied Krug rather than individual combat prowess.

name: Gargoyle
description: A winged stone creature that serves as a dungeon guardian.

name: Ghastly Necron
description: A purple-and-green-clothed undead creature resembling a mage, which wields a staff as a melee weapon rather than casting spells.

name: Ghost
description: A non-corporeal evil spirit that attacks from range with a life-draining assault that cannot be evaded, featuring lower defensive capability than creatures in its vicinity.

name: Giant Chitterskrag
description: An enormous crustacean-like creature resembling an elephant-sized crab with large pincers, multiple legs, and a grey or blue carapace.

name: Giant Lizard
description: A horned, quadrupedal reptile that approaches from ground level with slow but resilient movements.

name: Giant Moth
description: A giant insect with moth-like features. It attacks with its large body and wings.

name: Giant Rat
description: An oversized rodent enemy. It bites and claws at opponents.

name: Giant Skeleton
description: A towering skeletal humanoid standing approximately 10 feet tall, wielding a long sword and large shield. It attacks with powerful melee strikes and possesses substantial health reserves.

name: Giant Skeleton Stalker
description: An undead skeletal creature equipped with a sword and shield. It pursues enemies in groups alongside skeletal archers.

name: Giant Spider
description: A massive arachnid with multiple legs and fangs. It engages opponents with aggressive melee attacks and is encountered as a boss-level threat.

name: Giant Wasp
description: A flying insect with an elongated head, dangling legs, and a venomous stinger. It attacks from the air with stinging strikes.

name: Gobbot Blaster
description: A mechanical goblin-made tank with ranged weaponry. It fires explosive blasts at enemies from a distance.

name: Gobbot General
description: An animatronic leader construct equipped with a gas-based ranged weapon. It directs attacks from a distance using pressurized gas projectiles.

name: Gobbot Grenadier
description: A mechanical goblin automaton armed with a grenade launcher. It launches explosive ordnance with a wide blast radius.

name: Gobbot Gunner
description: A goblin-constructed automaton equipped with a minigun. It fires rapid streams of projectiles at opponents.

name: Gobbot Igniter
description: A goblin-made automaton equipped with a flamethrower that it uses to attack with fire-based weapons.

name: Gobbot Lobber
description: A goblin-made automaton armed with a mini-grenade launcher that fires explosive projectiles in combat.

name: Gobbot Scorcher
description: A weaker variant of the Gobbot Igniter, this automaton wields a flaemblaster that spews flames at enemies.

name: Gobbot Shocker
description: A goblin-made automaton equipped with a lightning gun that delivers electrical attacks to opponents.

name: Gobbot Sleeper
description: A goblin-made automaton that wields a dragon minigun as its primary weapon in combat.

name: Gobbot Zapper
description: A goblin-made automaton employed by goblins, though its specific armament and combat style are not described.

name: Goblin Blackguard
description: A heavily armored goblin defender wearing a leather uniform and wielding a custom clockwork hammer for powerful strikes.

name: Goblin Grunt
description: A low-ranked, unarmored goblin workman equipped with a worn hammer better suited for manufacturing than combat.

name: Goblin Guard
description: A goblin defender wearing a wood-and-steel carapace suit and armed with a blade capable of dealing significant damage.

name: Goblin Headsman
description: A well-armored goblin guard clad in scale mail and wielding a black steel weapon designed for fast slashing attacks.

name: Goblin Inventor
description: A technologically advanced goblin who designs and operates mechanical war machines. He pilots his creations from an internal cockpit and demonstrates skilled evasive maneuvers while unleashing multiple weapon systems against opponents.

name: Goblin Robo Suit
description: A towering wooden and steel two-legged mech equipped with a shoulder-mounted lightning gun, grenade launcher, flamethrower, and minigun arms. The pilot operates the suit with practiced skill, dodging projectiles while strafing enemies with coordinated weapon fire.

name: Gom
description: A god-king of the Seck faction, serving as a powerful final antagonist with divine authority and commanding presence.

name: Goo Grub
description: A small blob-like creature of indeterminate characteristics.

name: Goo Walker
description: A swamp-dwelling zombie that emerges from underground spawn points and attacks by launching visceral projectiles at enemies from a distance.

name: Googore
description: A gigantic worm-like creature with a segmented body that dwells in caves, capable of dealing substantial melee and elemental damage.

name: Googore Grub
description: A juvenile worm creature roughly human-sized, resembling a smaller version of the adult Googore with similar burrowing capabilities.

name: Gorack
description: A muscular humanoid primate wearing clothes and leather arm bands with an aggressive temperament, delivering powerful melee attacks and possessing high durability in combat.

name: Grave Crawler
description: A severely decomposed undead corpse possessing only a single leg bone, moving slowly by crawling toward targets but compensating with substantial health reserves.

name: Gray Wolf
description: A feral canine predator with gray fur that attacks using bites and physical assault in melee combat.

name: Great Krakbone
description: A massive green-skinned octopus with a single eye, large sharp beak, and long tentacles. It emerges from water to swipe at opponents with its tentacles.

name: Great Trog Warrior
description: An enhanced version of the Trog Warrior with greater strength, wearing red plated armor.

name: Greater Scrub Scorpion
description: A large scorpion species found in arid scrub environments, representing the upper tier of scrub scorpion varieties.

name: Green Drake
description: A drake inhabiting desert regions that attacks with claws at close range or breathes a corrosive luminous green mist from a distance.

name: Green Shard
description: A small crystalline creature that fires green homing projectile attacks, with moderate durability among its shard-type variants.

name: Gremal
description: A long-tusked rodent or lagomorph that hops about passively, though more aggressive variants exist.

name: Gresh
description: A Seck commander who wields powerful necromancy to command undead forces in direct combat.

name: Grizzly Furok
description: A demonic-looking furok variant with moderate combat ability, though it strengthens considerably at higher difficulty levels.

name: Gulik
description: A small pygmy creature found in jungle environments.

name: Hassat Archer
description: A cheetah-like ranger Hassat that wields a bow as its primary weapon.

name: Hassat Caster
description: A leonine spellcaster that hurls bright-blue projectile spells at its opponents.

name: Hassat Commander
description: A white sabertooth warrior wielding a staff in one hand and bearing protective guards fashioned from exotic materials. It fights with skilled, deliberate combat technique.

name: Hassat Fighter
description: A tiger-like swordsman armed with a tempered blade that it wields in direct melee combat against opponents.

name: Hassat Hunter
description: A cheetah-based ranger that attacks from range using a bow with quick, precise shots.

name: Hassat Mage
description: A lion-featured spellcaster adorned with colorful leather pouches that casts blue projectile spells and occasionally summons magical orbs.

name: Hassat Panther
description: A panther-like creature with exceptional physical resilience that engages in close-quarters combat, though with limited agility.

name: Hassat Ranger
description: A cheetah-form ranger clad in upgraded armor plating that hunts opponents from distance with a bow.

name: Hassat Runner
description: A cougar-resembling fighter with significant physical durability that relies on close-combat tactics.

name: Hassat Shaman
description: A lion-shaped spellcaster that launches blue projectile spells at its enemies from a distance.

name: Hassat Slicer
description: A leopard-like warrior that attacks with a large axe in brutal melee combat.

name: Headless Corpse
description: A decapitated, bloodied corpse that rises to attack when sensing nearby creatures. Despite its slow movement, it deals heavy damage in melee combat.

name: Headless Zombie
description: A beheaded undead corpse that emerges from the ground to assault intruders with brutal force, despite moving slowly and lacking a head to perceive its surroundings.

name: Heater
description: A heavily armored, treaded robotic tank equipped with a flamethrower cannon capable of dealing significant damage. It was constructed by goblins for territorial defense and industrial purposes.

name: Hell Boar
description: A four-legged creature with burnished scales, eye stalks, wormlike mandibles, and a lamprey mouth that charges recklessly into battle to maul opponents. It exhibits aggressive boar-like behavior despite its otherworldly appearance.

name: Horrid
description: A monster occasionally encountered in dungeons, with limited information available about its appearance or combat style.

name: Hunter
description: An attack drone fielded by goblins as an offensive combat unit.

name: Huskar the Shaman
description: A powerful Krug magic-user and miniboss that combines both physical and magical attacks in combat. It likely commands the Shaman caste among its kind.

name: Hydrack
description: A saurian creature with a long, scaled neck and draconic head that inhabits swamp lakes and remains mostly submerged while attacking. It breathes a cone of poisonous gas or acid that deals heavy damage across a large area.

name: Ice Archer
description: An elemental humanoid creature encountered in alpine environments that operates in coordinated packs. These archers deliver ranged attacks from behind defensive formations of other ice elementals.

name: Ice Fly
description: A small ice elemental found in deep magical ice caves that inhabits burrows throughout frozen regions. It poses minimal threat individually despite its magical nature.

name: Ice Giant
description: A towering humanoid with pale blue skin, white hair, and well-muscled build that displays signs of intelligence through its clothing. It inhabits frozen caves and relies on melee combat.

name: Ice Grub
description: A human-sized worm that moves through icy terrain and engages in direct combat.

name: Ice Mage
description: A hunchbacked, elderly humanoid that summons Ice Warriors to fight on its behalf while using ice-based magic attacks.

name: Ice Moth
description: An insectoid creature encountered in early-game alpine environments.

name: Ice Warrior
description: An elemental humanoid that operates in coordinated packs, can emerge unexpectedly from terrain, and provides defensive support for ranged allies. It carries valuable weaponry when defeated.

name: Ice Wasp
description: A small flying elemental creature that inhabits frozen regions and engages in aerial combat.

name: Immature Chitterskrag
description: The juvenile form of a larger insectoid species native to tropical island environments.

name: Impaler
description: A scorpion-like creature lacking frontal claws but armed with a long, flexible tail used for stabbing and bludgeoning attacks, known for emitting high-pitched vocalizations.

name: Infested Larch
description: A larger, more powerful variant of the common Larch that serves as a significant threat in its territory.

name: Island Lizard
description: A small reptile with a distinctive pattern of white stripes along its back, smaller than its continental cousins.

name: Jade Gargoyle
description: A jade-colored gargoyle that engages enemies from range using projectile attacks.

name: Jungle Angler
description: A creature found in jungle coastal areas that uses angling attacks to engage prey.

name: Jungle Klaw
description: A jungle variant of the Forest Klaw with clawed appendages used for melee combat.

name: Jungle Phrak
description: A insectoid creature that emerges from mound-like nests and attacks with aggression.

name: Jungle Skrubb
description: A small jungle-dwelling creature that scurries about and attacks with primitive force.

name: Jungle Slinger
description: A humanoid creature that hurls projectiles such as forks at enemies from a distance.

name: Jungle Slinger Camora
description: An enhanced variant of the Jungle Slinger that throws projectiles with greater skill and ferocity.

name: Jungle Spiker
description: A spined creature inhabiting jungle regions that uses its sharp protrusions in combat.

name: Kell
description: A pink-skinned serpentine demon with a horned head, glowing orange eyes, and sharp teeth that employs area-damage fireballs, homing magical projectiles, and lightning bolts as a resilient spellcaster.

name: Kill Bot
description: A mechanical attack drone with a quadrupedal or tracked design that fires projectiles at targets.

name: Killer Gremal
description: Oversized, hairless rodents with pinkish skin, huge red eyes, and long sharp teeth, possessing powerful leg muscles for hopping. They attack in large groups, hopping back and forth before biting with their prominent teeth.

name: Killer Vines
description: Large sentient carnivorous vines that emerge from the ground with a swaying motion. They attack by swiping at approaching creatures and sink back into the ground when defeated.

name: Klandank the Krug
description: A large, broad red-orange Krug with a glowing green aura, significantly taller and wider than a human. He wields a blunt dagger and moves with great speed despite dealing minimal damage.

name: Klaw
description: Tall hunching creatures with long arms, sharp claws, and three large horns atop their heads. They attack by lunging with gaping mouths and slashing with their claws, typically hunting in small packs.

name: Krakemaw the Putrid
description: A putrid Rahk miniboss creature.

name: Krug Apprentice
description: A Krug variant of apprentice rank.

name: Krug Chucker
description: A Krug variant that uses ranged weapons to attack.

name: Krug Commander
description: A Krug variant of commanding rank and strength.

name: Krug Dog
description: Roughly dog-like creatures with cream-white pelts and massive dagger-like canines. They are stronger than standard Krug scouts and typically appear in large packs.

name: Krug Grunt
description: A common, lower-ranked Krug warrior type.

name: Krug Guard
description: A heavily armored Krug resembling Raiders but nearly twice as strong, wearing mismatched armor plates with red waistbands and skull emblems on their chestplates. They serve as enforcers within Krug forces, holding territory and directing lesser Krug in combat.

name: Krug Killer Dog
description: A dangerous canine beast that is larger and more vicious than standard Krug Dogs, commonly found alongside Krug Raiders, Guards, and Commanders in combat.

name: Krug Raider
description: A mid-ranked Krug warrior that serves as a more formidable combatant than basic Krug forces, engaging enemies in melee combat.

name: Krug Scavenger
description: A lower-ranked Krug that appears to function as a weaker variant within the Krug hierarchy, likely engaging in basic melee attacks.

name: Krug Scout
description: A light combat Krug warrior that operates within the Krug forces, capable of engaging enemies in melee combat.

name: Krug Shaman
description: A Krug spellcaster that employs magical attacks rather than melee weapons, serving a support or offensive magical role in Krug groups.

name: Larch
description: A large, tree-like beast that resembles barkrunners and bog beasts, attacking with powerful punching strikes from its massive fists.

name: Lava Beast
description: A volcanic creature that uses magical spell attacks as its primary combat method.

name: Lava Horror
description: A small red-skinned imp with huge glowing yellow compound eyes, covered in demonic horns and wearing green underpants, engaging enemies in close melee combat.

name: Lava Imp
description: A short mauve-skinned horned imp found in volcanic regions, attacking enemies with melee strikes in territorial defense.

name: Lava Mage
description: A gray-skinned imp with glowing yellow eyes and elaborate horns that serves as a ranged attacker. It casts slow-moving orbs of magical energy at its targets.

name: Lava Runner
description: A red-horned imp with large glowing yellow eyes and mummy-like linen wrapping that attacks at range. It typically appears in groups and fires two magical orbs at moderate speed.

name: Lava Spirit
description: An elemental creature that appears as a pile of glowing volcanic rocks until provoked, then coalesces into a two-armed form capable of slow levitation. It deals significant melee damage when in close range and some variants possess ranged attacks.

name: Lectar
description: A small brown reptilian creature with hammerhead shark eyes and a scorpion-like mouth.

name: Leetch
description: A frozen invertebrate species with a physiology resembling Slargs.

name: Lesser Krakbone
description: A miniature one-eyed creature with green skin, octopus-like appearance, a large sharp beak, and long tentacles.

name: Lesser Scrub Scorpion
description: A scorpion species found in arid environments.

name: Lord Hovart
description: An undead enemy of significant threat level.

name: Lost Queen
description: Insufficient information provided.

name: Magma Beast
description: A miniboss-level lava beast that casts magical spells as its primary attack method.

name: Maljin Assassin
description: A phantom-like demon with a lean, agile physique that engages opponents in rapid melee combat with exceptional speed and ferocity.

name: Maljin Jolt
description: A small, grey-skinned demon that fires rapid barrages of obsidian projectiles at enemies with persistent aggression.

name: Maljin Phantom
description: A small, red-orange demon with elaborate horns that cycles through multiple spell attacks including fireballs, eldritch orbs, and homing missiles in rapid succession.

name: Maljin Stalker
description: A small, wiry demon wrapped in white cloth bindings that fights as a fast and dangerous melee combatant with martial prowess.

name: Mangler
description: An aggressive amphibian resembling a deep-sea fish with white chitinous armor, a gaping maw, and clawed forearms used for rapid overland pursuit of prey.

name: Mantrap
description: A worm-like creature with a textured, cucumber-like exterior that uses both melee and spell attacks.

name: Marble Golem
description: A massive stone construct with industrial-strength limbs that crushes threats with powerful crushing attacks.

name: Mechanized Wasp
description: A robotic version of a giant wasp with mechanical construction and aerial combat capabilities.

name: Mhulliq
description: A boar-like creature with a higher-pitched vocalization that exhibits aggressive charging behavior.

name: Mine Worm
description: A subterranean worm creature adapted to burrowing and underground combat.

name: Molten Drake
description: A drake with resplendent orange scales from a superheated body core that attacks with powerful claws and cone-shaped flaming breath.

name: Molten Steel Drake
description: A drake distinguished by brilliantly red-orange markings and a glowing aura of power that combines the physical durability of molten drakes with devastating melee attacks.

name: Monstrous Rat
description: An unusually large rodent with lurid green eyes and exposed flesh along its back that fights as a unique boss among giant rat counterparts.

name: Mountain Phrak
description: A species of phrak insect that nests on mountainous slopes and attacks intruders on its territory.

name: Mountain Quadscale
description: A weaker variant of the quadscale reptile found in volcanic regions that relies on physical attacks.

name: Mountain Troll
description: A large, scrawny ape-like creature with green fur, yellow eyes, and unusually long forearms that hunts in coordinated packs to overwhelm opponents.

name: Mucosa
description: A hostile spider-like creature that engages foes with melee attacks.

name: Mucosa Brute
description: A physically imposing mucosa variant that serves as a miniboss among its spider-like kind through enhanced melee combat.

name: Mucosa Predator
description: A mucosa with a luminous blue-and-purple carapace that attacks from range by spitting high-damage purple slime projectiles.

name: Mucosa Raider
description: A large mucosa with dull yellow-and-green markings that uses melee attacks and typically hunts in groups with other monsters.

name: Mummy
description: A decayed undead corpse wrapped in tattered burial wrappings. It shuffles forward to engage enemies in melee combat.

name: Muong Troll
description: A large, scaly-skinned troll distinguished by a glowing aura of natural energy. It attacks with powerful melee strikes.

name: Mutant Goblin Hurler
description: A sickly-colored, mutated goblin wearing leather armor with a distinctly unwell appearance. It specializes in hurling rocks as fast, ranged attacks.

name: Mutated Goblin Warrior
description: A heavily mutated goblin with enlarged musculature covered in the same base mesh as standard goblins. It wields a massive hammer-like weapon and delivers slow but devastating melee strikes.

name: Noctiss
description: A ghostly apparition clad in a black robe with a short tail-like extension. It attacks by casting spellwork and vanishes in a cloud of smoke upon death.

name: Nosirrom
description: A reptilian creature of imposing stature with evolved physiology. It engages enemies through direct confrontation.

name: Octodrak
description: A tentacled creature that emerges from underwater ruins and the ground itself. It lashes out with its tentacles at nearby threats.

name: Perforator
description: A four-legged goblin war machine armored with wood and steel, powered by a large battery on its back. It provides ranged suppressive fire using dual rotary cannons.

name: Phrak
description: A small, flying green insect resembling a bee with two large eyes and wings that allow it to hover at head height. It poses minimal threat with weak attacks and low durability.

name: Phrak Ballista
description: A larger, more dangerous variant of the flying Phrak equipped with ballistic weaponry. It attacks from the air with ranged ballista fire.

name: Phrak Piercer
description: A blue, ranged variant of Phrak that launches arrow-like spines at targets from a distance.

name: Picker
description: A dark spider-like creature with small eyes, a large jaw, and four long legs that inhabits water dungeons and attacks with its powerful mandibles.

name: Pitiful Braak
description: A miniboss Braak variant distinguished by glowing blue markings across its body that fights with melee attacks.

name: Possessed Armor
description: A translucent green shade encased in plate armor that moves slightly slower than humans but delivers devastating punching attacks with high durability.

name: Possessed Skull
description: A giant fleshy demonic skull that casts flaming projectiles at its opponents from range.

name: Proxo
description: A self-destructing war construct that detonates as its primary combat method.

name: Punisher
description: An undead monster in the form of a giant skull that uses spell-based ranged attacks.

name: Purple Shard
description: The largest and most dangerous crystalline shard creature that fires homing projectile attacks with high inherent damage.

name: Quadscale
description: A four-legged, armored insectoid creature found in volcanic regions that possesses a powerful bite but moves slowly.

name: Quillrabe Canyons
description: A series of canyon formations in a scorching desert landscape. The area is inhabited by various deadly creatures including demonic imps and large insectoid beings.

name: Rabid Spiked Maw
description: An enhanced variant of the standard Spiked Maw creature with increased ferocity and danger.

name: Rahk
description: An undead drake with mostly white scales and a green belly. It attacks with melee strikes and uses magical abilities in combat.

name: Reaper
description: A skeletal humanoid figure summoned as a guardian. It serves as a bodyguard and combatant in direct confrontations.

name: Rector
description: An undead humanoid creature representing the basic form of its class. It engages in melee combat as a standard undead foe.

name: Red Drake
description: A large drake with dull brick-colored scales that is physically imposing compared to other drake variants. It attacks using claws and breath attacks.

name: Rending Mhulliq
description: A large insectoid creature that represents a more powerful variant of its kind. It uses aggressive melee attacks in combat.

name: Rock Beast
description: A creature composed of or resembling stone and earth. It engages enemies through both physical attacks and magical abilities.

name: Rogue Bandit
description: A humanoid swordsman wearing a form-fitting chainmail suit and face mask who wields a gladius. It deals significant melee damage and demonstrates tactical intelligence, often coordinating with allied bandits.

name: Rotten Troll
description: An enhanced miniboss variant of the standard swamp troll with increased size and combat prowess. It attacks with powerful melee strikes.

name: Ruby Gargoyle
description: An animated stone gargoyle with a ruby-like appearance that serves as a boss enemy.

name: Rune Beast
description: A tan-colored, minotaur-like creature that engages in melee combat and can be encountered roaming or summoned.

name: Rune Caster
description: A witch-like humanoid that attacks by casting homing magic missiles or summoning rune monsters to fight on their behalf.

name: Rune Fiend
description: A bull-headed minotaur-like creature with sandy brown fur and hooves that attacks by casting red fire-based spells at targets.

name: Rune Guardian
description: The largest of the rune monsters, wielding a lightning-attuned scythe and summoned as a powerful combatant.

name: Rune Master
description: A leader figure of the rune cult who commands rune beasts and acts as a guardian against intruders.

name: Rusted Automaton
description: An ancient war machine with a three-barreled machine gun that provides ranged fire support alongside other mechanical constructs.

name: Sand Basher
description: A grey-skinned imp with elaborate horns and blue eyes that engages in melee combat, stronger than its ripper counterparts.

name: Sand Mage
description: A beige-skinned imp with large horns that attacks with powerful heat bursts, often appearing in swirling clouds of flame.

name: Sand Ripper
description: A brown-skinned imp with yellow extremities and orange compound eyes that engages in melee combat, weaker than sand bashers.

name: Sandskreech
description: A dark greenish arthropod with purple growths resembling a Picker. It inhabits sandy terrain and hunts as a solitary predator.

name: Scaly Rahk
description: A stronger variant of the Rahk with a distinctive purple belly. It attacks with melee strikes and possesses greater durability than its standard counterpart.

name: Scorch
description: No description provided.

name: Scorpion
description: A giant scorpion with a brilliant red-orange carapace, prominent pincers, and a segmented tail. It hunts aggressively using its natural weapons.

name: Scorpiot Gunner
description: A scorpion-resembling robot equipped with a fireshot launcher on one pincer, a Gatling burst cannon on the other, and a laser beam cannon on its tail-stinger. It engages enemies from range.

name: Scorpiot Slasher
description: A melee-focused scorpion-shaped robot armed with triple blades—two on its front arms and one on its tail. It closes distance to slash opponents.

name: Scrub Howler
description: An enormous bipedal mandrill with dark ochre fur, white belly, and a hairless face featuring a red stripe and blue ridges. It wields a long staff with a crescent moon blade and strikes with incredible speed while emitting battle cries.

name: Scrub Troll
description: A large, lanky ape-like creature with brownish-yellowish fur, yellow eyes, and unusually long forearms. It attacks in coordinated packs to overwhelm prey.

name: Sea Mangler
description: An amphibious deep-sea creature with a scaly body, enormous toothy maw, two small eyes, and clawed forearms. It is highly aggressive and capable of both swimming and crawling on land.

name: Seck Archer
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid warrior wielding a standard bow and relying on high constitution. Seck archers are significantly stronger than typical combatants and pose a serious threat in groups.

name: Seck Elite Archer
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid with superior armor resembling an Elite Guard. It fights from range with a bow, delivering high damage output.

name: Seck Elite Guard
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid wearing a distinctive uniform and wielding a melee weapon. It engages in close combat with high defense and damage capabilities.

name: Seck Grunt
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid of large stature wearing drab garments. It relies on melee fighting skill and physical constitution in battle.

name: Seck High Mage
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid dressed in elaborate clothing and a cape, wielding a staff. It attacks with magical flame attacks.

name: Seck Mage
description: A grey-skinned, muscular humanoid wearing a finely-wrought cape and body suit, wielding a staff. It employs flame-based spells in combat.

name: Shadow Lunger
description: A creature distinguished by strange magenta patterns covering its body. Its combat behavior is not specified.

name: Shadowjumper
description: A shadowy sorcerer that attacks with magical spells. It is a powerful spellcaster capable of dealing significant magical damage.

name: Shadowjumper Lieutenant
description: A humanoid bodyguard armed with a katana imbued with blue lightning enchantments. It engages in close melee combat.

name: Shard
description: A crystalline creature that lies dormant as scattered fragments until approached, then coalesces into a body core with four pronged legs. It attacks by launching homing projectiles at adversaries.

name: Shrack
description: A hostile fish that dwells in flooded underground environments. It remains contained until disturbed, then rushes out to attack.

name: Skank Witch
description: A witch draped in red rags and surrounded by a deathly purple aura. It attacks with magical abilities and poses a significant magical threat.

name: Skeleton
description: An animated skeletal humanoid composed of bones held together by dark magic. It engages enemies through melee combat.

name: Skeleton Archer
description: A skeletal figure armed with a bow that fires projectiles at range. It relies on ranged attacks to strike from a distance.

name: Skeleton Captain
description: A command-structure skeleton that typically leads other skeletal minions in coordinated attacks. It serves as a tactical threat among undead forces.

name: Skeleton Guard
description: A basic skeletal warrior that forms the primary melee defense of undead forces. It attacks with straightforward bone and blade strikes.

name: Skeleton Krug Dog
description: An animated canine skeleton far stronger than its living counterpart, with powerful jaws and teeth. These creatures hunt in large coordinated packs to overwhelm prey through numerical advantage.

name: Skeleton Mercenary
description: A reanimated swordsman reduced to skeletal form, capable of wielding melee weapons with trained skill. It attacks with disciplined sword techniques.

name: Skeleton Ranger
description: An undead archer stripped to bone, retaining combat proficiency with ranged weaponry. It attacks from distance with projectiles.

name: Skick
description: A spindly humanoid creature with four long spider-like arms, two legs, and a small head dominated by a single large red eye. It uses its multiple arms to crawl and rapidly slash enemies with sharp claws.

name: Skitterclaw
description: An ostrich-sized flightless bird with bright red feathers, long legs, and a large sharp beak. It is highly aggressive and uses its beak and talons as weapons, typically appearing in groups.

name: Skitterling
description: A small, purple-feathered avian creature that resembles a juvenile version of larger skitterclaw predators. It hunts through quick, skittering movements typical of its species.

name: Slag
description: A lava golem composed of molten rock and solidified magma. It attacks with heat-based melee strikes and can withstand significant physical punishment due to its hardened exterior.

name: Slarg
description: A green-skinned amphibian resembling a mudskipper with short horns and side-mounted arms. It attacks by extending a large, retractable sphincter maw that folds in and out of its body.

name: Snapper
description: A small, aggressive amphibious creature with a scaly body, enormous maw, fins, and a single eye, equipped with clawed forearms for rapid overland movement. These creatures hunt in groups and employ ambush tactics from water or brush.

name: Snow Boar
description: A cold-adapted variant of the Hell Boar with a stocky, armored body suited to arctic terrain. It charges and gores opponents with its tusks and heavy bulk.

name: Snow Wolf
description: A large canine predator adapted to arctic environments with thick fur and powerful jaws. It hunts aggressively using speed and coordinated pack tactics.

name: Soul Stinger
description: A flying desert insect with an elongated abdomen and a venomous stinger. It attacks from the air with precise piercing strikes more penetrating than similar winged insects.

name: Spider
description: A harmless arachnid roughly the size of a tarantula with eight legs and multiple eyes. It is a non-hostile creature found in enclosed spaces.

name: Spiked Dweller
description: A large, toad-like creature with bright green spikes covering its back. It attacks by leaning forward and ejecting clusters of spikes from its body.

name: Spiked Maw
description: A squat, toad-like creature covered in steely-grey spikes along its back. It attacks by presenting its spiked back and violently ejecting spike clusters at prey.

name: Stalagnid
description: A spider with green markings on its abdomen that disguises itself as a stalagmite until approached, then unfurls to attack. They typically hunt in small groups and are dangerous at close range.

name: Stingbot
description: A robotic insectoid creature designed as a mechanical version of the Synged. It attacks with mechanical precision and efficiency.

name: Swamp Creature
description: A large, lumbering humanoid monster with extremely high durability and damage output. These creatures can be summoned and controlled by magic users.

name: Swamp Slinger
description: A small, green-hued shambling creature that resembles a diminutive version of the Swamp Creature. They attack in groups by hurling noxious projectiles at enemies.

name: Swamp Stinger
description: A giant predatory fly with a glistening blue carapace, faceted eyes, and oversized proportions. It attacks humans aggressively and relentlessly.

name: Swamp Troll
description: A miniature yellow-skinned troll wielding a club that inhabits swampy terrain. Despite their small size, they appear in large groups and pose a significant threat.

name: Swamp Witch
description: A hunchbacked spellcaster appearing as an old woman in rags and a dark hooded cloak with claw-like hands. She casts ranged elemental spells and continuously summons other creatures to fight alongside her, retreating when approached.

name: Swanny the Mad Jailer
description: A burly man with a heavy mustache wearing a green leather jerkin and executioner's hood, armed with a thick wooden bat. He attacks with brute force and melee weapon strikes.

name: Swarmling Drone
description: A red-carapaced insectoid creature with mandibles that bite enemies in melee combat. These drones typically protect larger creatures and attack in coordinated groups.

name: Swarmling Queen
description: A green-carapaced arthropod with a ranged breath weapon attack that strikes from a distance. It is typically surrounded and defended by smaller drones.

name: Swirling Midges
description: Small flying insects that attack from a distance using homing projectile spells.

name: Synged
description: Demonic flying creatures with fleshy bodies, large pedipalps, and a prominent compound eye that engage enemies with ranged attacks.

name: Syrrus
description: A saurian creature with a long, scaled neck and draconic head that remains mostly submerged while attacking with a cone of super-chilled caustic breath.

name: Teal Shard
description: A crystalline creature of modest size that fires homing projectile attacks at opponents.

name: Terror Wraith
description: A skeletal floating spirit consisting of a skull, ribcage, arms, and spine that moves with high speed and attacks with melee weapons.

name: Tesla Coil
description: A stationary machine with a cross-shaped configuration that activates upon sensing nearby targets and discharges powerful electrical bolts.

name: The Lost Witch
description: A dark-skinned witch with glowing eyes wearing tattered green garments that uses ranged ice attacks and summons additional creatures to aid in combat.

name: Toreck
description: A brutish minotaur-like humanoid with tusks and ungulate legs that wields a polearm with rapid, relentless attacks.

name: Tortured Corpse
description: An early-encountered undead enemy.

name: Tretch
description: A tall sentient tree with a large yellow eye and flexible branch-like arms that swipes and lashes at approaching foes.

name: Trog
description: Hunchbacked humanoids with thin limbs, solid yellow eyes, and beaked mouths filled with teeth. They display intelligence by organizing into hierarchies and wielding weapons and armor, fighting as coordinated combatants.

name: Trog Knight
description: The most heavily armored variant of Trog, clad in scale armor and wielding a massive greatsword in combat.

name: Trog Warrior
description: Medium-sized Trog infantry wearing brigandine armor and fighting with a sword and metal shield.

name: Troll Masher
description: A massive green-skinned giant wearing a fur loincloth that delivers devastating melee damage with its fists and possesses considerable durability.

name: Unguis
description: An aquatic creature that extends a cephalopod tentacle from submerged structures to attack; it dies when the tentacle is sufficiently damaged.

name: Ursae
description: A rotting, decomposing undead bear that shuffles through marshy terrain as a mindless hostile creature.

name: Varg
description: Small wolf-like solitary hunters that emit high-pitched growls and yips; they pose minimal threat despite occasional aggressive behavior.

name: Venom Fiend
description: A large scorpion with distinctive red-orange glowing markings that serves as a formidable miniboss.

name: Vile Mucosa
description: A gelatinous creature variant that attacks with viscous projectiles during early-stage encounters.

name: Walking Corpse
description: A reanimated undead humanoid that shambles forward as a basic hostile corpse.

name: Warrior Wraith
description: A disembodied spirit consisting of a skull, arms, ribcage, and spine that radiates a purple aura, floating through the air and delivering savage melee attacks with fearless intensity.

name: Water Elemental
description: A hulking, horned biped composed entirely of congealed water rather than flesh, attacking with massive fists in a berserk manner.

name: Water Elemental Minion
description: A small aquatic spirit with a glistening aqua sheen and the general form of a Mangler, possessing unearthly strength despite its diminutive size.

name: Water Lunger
description: A dark grey-skinned creature that engages in close-quarters hand-to-hand combat in flooded zones.

name: Water Slinger
description: A blue-green aquatic creature that launches javelin or fork-like projectiles in rapid succession during combat.

name: Weathered Automaton
description: A Utraean war machine equipped with long blades on each arm, serving as a frontline fighter to protect ranged allies.

name: White Wolf
description: A wolf creature that serves as a standard melee combatant in wilderness and dungeon environments.

name: Wraith
description: A disembodied skeletal spirit with a skull, arms, ribcage, and spine that floats through the air, moves faster than full-bodied skeletons, and attacks fearlessly in melee combat.

name: Wraith Archer
description: A legless cursed spirit composed of a skull, arms, ribcage, and spine that floats in the air and attacks with a bow from a distance.

name: Wraith Mage
description: A floating skeletal spirit lacking its lower half that casts a slow-moving, homing projectile spell dealing life-draining damage to its targets.

name: Wraith Piercer
description: A cursed spirit consisting of a skull, arms, ribcage, and spine with no lower body that floats through the air. It functions as a ranged combatant, wielding a bow and attacking from a distance with greater speed and agility than skeletal creatures.

name: Wraith Warlock
description: A spectral spellcaster with only an upper body that hovers in the air, capable of casting a long-range lightning spell that deals heavy damage and cannot be dodged. It moves faster than full-bodied skeletons and requires swift engagement to prevent sustained magical assault.

name: Yellow Eye
description: A large bear with a distinctive appearance that serves as a powerful territorial guardian. It attacks with physical force and bears dangerous claws.

name: Yellow Spider
description: A small, pus-yellow arachnid roughly the size of a crate that descends from its webs to attack. It can traverse vertical surfaces and walls with ease.

name: Yeti
description: A towering humanoid creature covered in thick white fur with large clawed hands, resembling mythological descriptions of its kind. It relies on brute physical strength and massive claws to tear apart prey.

name: Zaurask Adept
description: A reptilian spellcaster of mid-tier rank that carries a staff as its primary weapon. It employs combat magic in battle.

name: Zaurask Archer
description: A lower-tier reptilian warrior equipped with a bow for ranged attacks. It represents the earliest-encountered bow-using variant of its species.

name: Zaurask Claw
description: An unarmored scaly reptilian with no weapons that relies entirely on its natural claws and physical strength in combat. It represents the weakest tier of Zaurask infantry.

name: Zaurask Fang
description: A scaly reptilian warrior wearing a left shoulder plate that fights using martial techniques and hand-to-hand combat. It is stronger than unarmored variants of its species.

name: Zaurask Fighter
description: An elite scaly reptilian warrior equipped with a turtle-shell shield and trained in melee combat. It represents the highest tier of Zaurask basic infantry.

name: Zaurask Incanter
description: A reptilian spellcaster with a hunched posture that launches red magical projectiles at enemies from range.

name: Zaurask Leader
description: An elite Zaurask warrior clad in heavier armor and equipped with a turtle-shell shield, engaging foes in close melee combat.

name: Zaurask Lightning
description: A ranged archer that fires physical projectiles with speed and precision to support ground forces from a distance.

name: Zaurask Mage
description: A high-tier reptilian spellcaster that unleashes powerful magical attacks against enemies from range.

name: Zaurask Ranger
description: An elite archer equipped with superior weaponry that provides accurate ranged physical support in combat.

name: Zaurask Seer
description: A mid-tier magical practitioner that casts spells to damage and support other Zaurask forces from a distance.

name: Zaurask Slasher
description: A heavily armored melee fighter resembling the Leader class but without a shield, using sword attacks in direct combat.

name: Zaurask Slavemaster
description: An elite infantry unit covered in protective gear that wields melee weapons and fights aggressively in close quarters.

name: Zaurask Spine
description: A bow-wielding archer that fires physical projectiles to strike enemies from range alongside other Zaurask forces.

name: Zaurask Whacker
description: A basic reptilian warrior armed with a sword that engages enemies in melee combat as front-line infantry.

name: Zepheryl
description: A creature composed of red magical energy that attacks enemies with electrical discharge. Zepheryls have a larger dark variant.

name: Ztrool
description: A small creature resembling a chomper that hides within rocks and emerges to attack. Ztrools have a compact, rock-dwelling physiology.
